# Soundloom — Media Rosenqvist Music Catalog

> Central music catalog for Media Rosenqvist services: Radio Core, Music Core, Radio Uppsala and distribution. Frontend built on top of music-catalog-core.

Soundloom is the catalog and upload interface used by Media Rosenqvist to manage artists, releases and tracks across multiple radio and music services.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of the Soundloom catalog frontend.
- [Discover](/discover): Browse new and featured releases.
- [Releases](/releases): Singles, EPs and albums in the catalog.
- [Artists](/artists): Artists registered in the catalog.
- [Tracks](/tracks): Individual tracks across releases.
- [Albums](/albums): Album-format releases.
- [Platform Status](/status): Backend and integration health.
